steps.title: Install the endpoint agent (current standard: Wazuh)
steps.why: A machine the fleet monitor cannot see is where a compromise lives unnoticed.
steps.instructions: How: How: How: How: Install the current agent for this platform; point it at the manager. Update THIS runbook when the tooling changes - everything referencing /eprotection follows automatically.
steps.done_when: The machine appears in the monitoring console and reports events.

steps.title: Antivirus active
steps.instructions: Platform standard (Defender policy on Windows; ClamXav on Mac). Confirm real-time protection is ON, not just installed.
steps.done_when: A test EICAR file is detected.

steps.title: Agent auto-update confirmed
steps.why: A stale agent is a false sense of security with a version number.
steps.done_when: Auto-update enabled, or the update task exists in the maintenance schedule.
